summary: Dataset Summary feature testing completed. All 12 features verified - 12/12 PASSED. The new Dataset Summary card correctly appears after loading a dataset, displays domain detection, 5-line description, focus line, key variables, and suggested target. Domain detection works correctly for Insurance, Loan Approval (Financial/Credit), and House Prices (Real Estate/Housing) datasets. The card coexists properly with Dataset Profile and Dataset Scanner cards. Previously working features (export, share, training) remain functional.
passed_tests: TEST 1: PASSED - Dataset Summary card NOT visible when no dataset loaded
TEST 2a: PASSED - Dataset Summary card appears after selecting Insurance dataset
TEST 2b: PASSED - Domain correctly detected as 'Insurance' for Insurance dataset
TEST 3: PASSED - Domain correctly detected as 'Financial / Credit Analysis' for Loan Approval dataset
TEST 4: PASSED - Domain correctly detected as 'Real Estate / Housing' for House Prices dataset
TEST 5: PASSED - Summary text contains 5 description lines (data-testid='dataset-summary-text')
TEST 6: PASSED - Focus line shows 'This dataset mainly focuses on...' (data-testid='dataset-focus-line')
TEST 7: PASSED - Key variables section shows tagged columns (data-testid='dataset-key-variables')
TEST 8: PASSED - Suggested target shows when a likely target is detected (data-testid='dataset-target-suggestion')
TEST 9: PASSED - Dataset Summary card coexists with Dataset Profile and Dataset Scanner cards
TEST 10: PASSED - Training functionality still works (Start Training button, model training completes)
TEST 11: PASSED - Export buttons (Share Analysis, Download CSV) appear after training
TEST 12: PASSED - All data-testid attributes present and functional
critical_code_review_comments: 1. DOMAIN_KEYWORDS (lines 229-240) - Comprehensive keyword mapping for 10 domains + general fallback
2. generateDatasetSummary function (lines 242-303) - Properly detects domain, identifies key variables, suggests target
3. datasetSummary useMemo (line 1406) - Correctly memoized based on dataProfile dependency
4. Dataset Summary card rendering (lines 2342-2370) - All required data-testid attributes present
5. Card placement between Dataset Profile and Dataset Scanner is correct
6. Domain detection uses keyword matching on column names - works well for standard datasets
seed_data_creation: Used built-in sample datasets: Loan Approval (sample-dataset-0), House Prices (sample-dataset-1), Insurance Costs (sample-dataset-2)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dataset Summary feature fully tested and working. Key data-testids verified: dataset-summary-card, dataset-domain-badge, dataset-summary-text, dataset-focus-line, dataset-key-variables, dataset-target-suggestion. Domain detection keywords cover: finance, health, sales, education, realestate, hr, insurance, ecommerce, transportation, environment. Falls back to 'General Data Analysis' if no match. Sample datasets: 0=Loan Approval (Financial/Credit), 1=House Prices (Real Estate/Housing), 2=Insurance Costs (Insurance), 3=TV Shows (General). The generateDatasetSummary function uses keyword matching on column names to detect domains.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - This was a new feature implementation test, not a bug fix. All features working as expected.
